components.name: Basic Table
components.description: Semantic HTML table with proper structure.
components.usage: Tabular data display. Semantic thead/tbody structure.
components.accessibility: Semantic <table> with proper TH elements for headers.

components.name: Unordered List
components.usage: Unordered items, features, benefits, bullet points.
components.accessibility: Semantic <ul> element. Screen reader announces list structure.

components.name: Ordered List
components.accessibility: Semantic <ol> element. Order is semantic meaning.

components.name: Description List
components.html:
<dl>
  <dt>Term One</dt>
  <dd>Definition of term one.</dd>
  <dt>Term Two</dt>
  <dd>Definition of term two.</dd>
</dl>

components.name: Statistics Grid
components.accessibility: Semantic structure. Numbers readable by screen readers.

components.name: Timeline
components.html:
1. Event One

    Description of first event.

  2. Event Two

    Description of second event.
components.usage: History, roadmaps, process flows, chronological events.
components.accessibility: Semantic <ol> with text descriptions of events.

components.name: Comparison Table
components.usage: Pricing tables, feature comparison, side-by-side analysis.
components.accessibility: Semantic table. Clear headers distinguish sections.
